name: Deluxe Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a square pan, 9 x 9 x 2 inches.
Melt margarine and chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly until melted; let cool slightly.
In a large bowl, beat sugar, vanilla, and eggs on high speed for 5 minutes.
Beat in the chocolate mixture on low speed.
Mix in flour just until blended. Stir in walnuts.
Pour batter into pan.
Bake 40 to 45 minutes or until brownies begin to pull away from sides of pan. Let cool completely before cutting.
Cut cooled brownies into 2-inch squares.
